info.name: Snowstorm v8, FHIR R4 KAD
info.description:
FHIR Terminology Services API on SNOMED International's open source SNOMED CT Terminology Server, Snowstorm, https://github.com/IHTSDO/snowstorm.

**note** You will need to set up an environment to use for url variable on the APIs. Either http://localhost:8080 if running a local instance or another URL of an instance available to you.

item.name: CodeSystem

request.description: List all CodeSystem resources on the server. Results limited to 10.
Find CodeSystem resources that match the supplied title.

item.name: Find CodeSystem by url and version

request.description: Find CodeSystem resources that match the supplied url and version.
Find CodeSystem resources that match the supplied url and version.

item.description: Given a code/system, or a Coding, get additional details about the concept, including definition, status, designations, and properties

item.name: ValueSet

request.description: List all the value sets on the server instance
List all the value sets on the server instance
List all the value sets on the server instance
List all the value sets on the server instance
List all the value sets on the server instance

item.name: Search hl7 value set with name and url

request.description: List all the value sets on the server instance
List all the value sets on the server instance
List all the value sets on the server instance

This is an example of a ValueSet that contains another ValueSet, see compose > include > valueSet.

Snowstorm currently supports this for all code systems appart from SNOMED CT. SNOMED CT value sets can contain mutiple include/exclude parts multiple ECL statements and filters but not nested value sets.

item.name: Create a ValueSet with specific id

request.description: PUT is used to create a ValueSet with a specific identifier. This operation will overwrite any existing ValueSet with this identifier.
When creating a ValueSet via POST a Location header is returned with the new real URL for the ValueSet. The URL contains the generated ValueSet identifier.

item.name: Delete a ValueSet by url and version

request.description: Delete all ValueSets matching the url and version values specified.

item.name: Delete a ValueSet by specific id

request.description: Delete a ValueSet by id.

item.description: The definition of a value set is used to create a simple collection of codes suitable for use for data entry or validation.

request.description: Expand an implicit ValueSet of all SNOMED CT concepts. If there is no module in the implicit ValueSet url and no version parameter is given then the latest version of the International Edition will be used.

Expand an implicit ValueSet of all SNOMED CT concepts. If there is no module in the implicit ValueSet url and no version parameter is given then the latest version of the International Edition will be used.

item.name: Expand IG snomed be(nl) valueset (be version specified)

request.description: Expand an implicit ValueSet of all SNOMED CT concepts. If there is no module in the implicit ValueSet url and no version parameter is given then the latest version of the International Edition will be used.

Expand an implicit ValueSet of all SNOMED CT concepts. If there is no module in the implicit ValueSet url and no version parameter is given then the latest version of the International Edition will be used.

item.name: Expand implict set of all SNOMED concepts

request.description: Expand an implicit ValueSet of all SNOMED CT concepts. If there is no module in the implicit ValueSet url and no version parameter is given then the latest version of the International Edition will be used.

item.name: Search within implict set of all SNOMED concepts

request.description:
Expand an implicit ValueSet of all SNOMED CT concepts filtered using a multi-prefix term search. Searching for "myocar inf" we expect to find "Myocardial infarction" and others.

If there is no module in the ValueSet url and no version parameter is given then the latest version of the International Edition will be used.

item.name: Expand implict set of all SNOMED refsets that have members

request.description: Expand an implicit ValueSet which is the list of SNOMED CT reference sets that have members.

item.name: Search for a term in Spanish

request.description:
When filtering the expansion of a value set the displayLanguage can be used to control both the language of the descriptions to search against AND the language of the terms returned in the response.

In this example the displayLanguage is set to Spanish (es) and the Spanish term "asma" is used to find asthma concepts.

item.name: List all the descendants of a given concept

request.description: This example lists all concepts that are descendants of 27624003 |Chronic disease (disorder)|.

The example ECL query is to retrieve only those concepts whose defining relationships match the given attribute value pairs:

< 404684003 |clinical finding|: 116676008 |associated morphology| = *

response.name: Run an ECL query

header.value: HAPI FHIR 5.6.3-si-SNAPSHOT/8a39f99ce3/2022-07-04 REST Server (FHIR Server; FHIR 4.0.1/R4)

item.name: Search a valueset for a given term

request.description: Term filtering - ValueSet of all <<763158003 |Medicinal product (product)| containing the word aspirin.  This is not case sensitive.

response.name: Search a valueset for a given term

header.value: HAPI FHIR 5.6.3-si-SNAPSHOT/8a39f99ce3/2022-07-04 REST Server (FHIR Server; FHIR 4.0.1/R4)

item.name: Expand an intensional refset with all Swedish and English descriptions
List all members of a given SNOMED refset

request.description: List all SNOMED concepts in the General Practice  / Family Practice reference set

item.name: List all members of a given SNOMED refset in the Uruguay Edition

request.description:
This is an example of expanding an intensional value set using a SNOMED CT refset from a national edition. The terms are returned in Spanish.  
_This requires the Uruguay Edition to be loaded into the Snowstorm instance being used._

item.name: Expand a inline ValueSet SNOMED list
ICD-10 - Expand implict set of all concepts

request.description: Expand an implicit ValueSet of all concepts. This works for any code system.

response.name: ICD-10 - Expand implict set of all concepts

header.value: HAPI FHIR 5.6.3-si-SNAPSHOT/8a39f99ce3/2022-07-04 REST Server (FHIR Server; FHIR 4.0.1/R4)

Translate
Translate inactive SNOMED CT code to active code using "SAME AS" map

request.description: Historical Association find the "SAME AS" target for inactivated concept

item.name: Translate SNOMED CT code to ICD-10
Translate SNOMED CT code to ICD-10-CM

query.description: US Edition, where the implicit map exists

item.description: Translate a code from one value set to another, based on the existing value set and concept maps resources, and/or other additional knowledge available to the server
